summary: Joel Spolsky announces the publication of his book 'User Interface Design for Programmers' in print form through Apress. The book originated as a series of articles on his blog. The printed version includes bonus chapters not available in the web version, along with additional illustrations and professional design work by Apress.
key_points: Joel's UI design book has been published in print by Apress
The book originated as web content on Joel on Software
The print edition includes bonus chapters and more illustrations not found online
money_quotes: The printed version of the book has several bonus chapters which are not on the web version.
key_insight: Joel transitioned his popular web-based UI design content into a published book with additional material, demonstrating the viability of blog-to-book publishing.
